pages.raw_text:
| With Taft and Roosevelt both
maintaining that. their policies are
the only things that will stave off
socialism, it is a certainty that So
cialism will be an issue in the
coming campaign. This is the first
time in the history Of the country
that either of the old parties have
recognized socialism as an active
political factor Hitherto they
have ignored it.


The continuous succession of
court decisions legalizing the black
list, making the boycott criminal
and making union funds available
to employers through legal action.
has shown labor men the absolute
necessity of immediate political &C.
ton.


The experience of other countries
has proved that this step is closely
followed by the adoption of social
ism by trade unions. England Of
fers the most striking example. The
Taff-Vale decision was followed at
once by the formation of the labor
party, which, in the last three
years, has become avowedly So
cialistic, with more than 80 men,
beers in the house of commons. &.


The socialist party itself Is now
